title: Crafty's 2025 Music Disc Mod
description: Adding famous songs of 2025 into a mod!
body:
# **Crafty 's 2025 Music Disc Mod**

Listen to many popular songs of 2025 all in Minecraft

I have put my time making a mod with 7 music discs of the 2025 trending songs and yea.
Credits to the singers or whatever.
If you own one of these songs and would not like it on here please dm me on picoauth1 on Discord.
Songs may or may not be copyrighted.
